ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* The textual content of the article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic or category of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to read the article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source where the article was published */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the article content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain or website of the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the source was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the sentiment score to be categorized */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the sentiment score to be categorized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiment" (
  "article_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-sentiment association */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment category */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_sentiment_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_sentiment_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device and browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
